name: Rum Eggnog Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 boxes yellow cake mix (for a 9-inch bundt pan)
2 tablespoons rum or 1 tablespoon rum extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bundt pan well.
2. Press the almond slices onto the bottom of the greased pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix all remaining ingredients together thoroughly for about five minutes until no lumps remain.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) in an oven for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool for about 10 minutes before turning it out onto a serving plate.
